subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Varaqih Muqinih made mention of thee in this gathering, wherefore this pen is occupied with thy remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ورقه موقنه ذکر ترا در این محضر نمود لهذا این خامه بیاد تو مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @thankfulness; gratitude
